review_notes: Browser review 2026-05-28: AIToolsGuide exposes a public submit form at https://aitoolsguide.com/submit with Tool name, Website URL, Category, and Why should it be listed fields. Footer states Submit Tool and We never accept pay-to-play placement.

Browser review 2026-05-28: BusinessHunt exposes a real submit page at https://businesshunt.co/businesses/add, but that page explicitly says You're not logged in and Please sign up or log in to submit your product. Reject as login-gated/manual flow.

Browser review 2026-05-28: Cuspera vendors flow at https://www.cuspera.com/vendors is a vendor marketing page. LIST SOFTWARE opens a software-search modal and a beta request/demo form rather than a direct public listing submission form at this candidate URL.

Browser review 2026-05-28: Ldmstudio Directory has a free regular listing path at https://www.directory.ldmstudio.com/add/add.php, but the category submit form requires a Validation Code CAPTCHA before Add URL. Reject for automation as auth/CAPTCHA-gated.

Browser review 2026-05-28: HubSpot Marketplace is a real app marketplace, but the marketplace utility nav exposes Log in and the technology partner/app submission flow is partner-program managed rather than a public anonymous submit form at this candidate URL. Reject as auth-gated/manual partner flow.
Official site review 2026-05-28: EU Business presents as a European business news and information portal rather than a software or startup directory submission surface.
